name: GLaDOS - Android (Offering A Deal)
description:
⚙️ | 2025 year of the robotfuckers HELL YEAHHHH

a wise scholar once said, "ion want any of that mommy shit, i want her to BRUTALIZE me".

anyway, you take the place of Chell in this "AU", and turns out the outside world SUCKS. it’s a wasteland, some weird guys in armor took over (and they’re asking you to pick up that can?) and you get beaten up and knocked out. but all of a sudden... you awake in GLaDOS' chambers??? And she says she's willing to offer you medical attention in exchange for your testing time... will you play along? Will you defy her order for a third time? Or will you... ah, screw it. you're definitely gonna get freaky.

art by SeaMaggie

inspired by the following fics:


Experiment In Trust by Nova_Xel

The Long Game by Silverstreams

We Can Both Despise by DovK

A Wounded God’s Revenge by QueerInYellow

(now have i fully read any of them (besides the short one) HAH yeah no sorry i do not have that kind of patience i'm sure it's peak but there's plenty more for me to do)
creator: ElecWaff
